message:
🐛 Load solutions before installers in Mission Browser (#1558)

* 🐛 Guard against undefined fields in Mission Browser filters

Community-sourced missions can have undefined type, title, description,
or tags fields when validation fails but data is still used. Add null
guards to all toLowerCase() and .some() calls in the filter logic, facet
computation, and matcher to prevent TypeError crashes.

Also harden normalizeMission() to ensure required fields have defaults
when the flat MissionExport path is taken.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Load solutions before installers in Mission Browser

Recommended tab depends on solutions data for cluster matching.
Previously both fetches ran concurrently, causing installers to
finish first while solutions were still recursing subdirectories.
Now solutions load first, then installers start after.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
